title: Rongo
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Rongo''' was a group of two [[Cargo ferry|cargo ferries]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. They were to meet with Cargo Ferry group [[Fanir]] to pickup the Airam's cargo of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] munitions at the [[Ytha'ac Cluster/Legends|Ytha'ac Cluster]] in the [[Ytha'ac system]]. However, the Imperials had sent a strike force consisting of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport]]s to recover the munitions. The smugglers dropped the cargo for Rongo to pick up and then quickly jumped into hyperspace. Rongo then attempted to pick up the munitions and make a run for hyperspace while [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] provided starfighter cover.

==Behind the scenes==
What happens then depends if the Rebels defeat the Imperials the cargo ferries escape but if the Imperials win their transports will disable the ships and capture them.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
